cases.desc: Obligation of 300 over 3 equal periods of 100 each sums to the total
Three equal periods of 100 but total recorded as 250 breaks conservation
Three equal periods of 50 summing to a total of 150

notes: The rule's core is equal recognition across periods; modeled as conservation where each period contributes the same amountPerPeriod and their sum equals totalAmount. The closed grammar has no aggregation/quantifier over a variable number of child periods, so parts is fixed to a 3-period instance; equality across periods is captured by every part being the same field (amountPerPeriod).
